name: Molecule AirTEC
tagline: Scientifically engineered recovery mattress trusted by athletes
description: Molecule is the official sleep partner of the NFL, PGA TOUR, and USA Triathlon, and the AirTEC is their flagship mattress. It features proprietary AirTEC foam with Microban antimicrobial technology and a zoned support system for targeted pressure relief. The advanced open-cell structure provides 7× better airflow than traditional memory foam, making it a top choice for athletes who need recovery and cooling.
features: 7× more airflow than traditional memory foam
Official partner of NFL and PGA
seoTitle: Molecule AirTEC 2026: Pro Athlete Recovery Mattress, Now for You?
